changes_since_last_audit.description: filters 30d commits jumped from 0 to 16. Active list architecture refactoring: Excel-style header filters, preset filters. Zero test coverage.
layout 30d commits increased from 0 to 7 via list architecture unification.
37 new module READMEs added. JSDoc improved in 31 provider handler files. avg_quality_score improved from 3.7 to 4.2.
Five sub-modules now tracked: admin, config, root, shared, tests.
Uncommitted migration 20260303110000_fix_admin_restore_sale_race.sql persists in working tree.

modules.name: providers
risk_factors: 24.9K LOC largest provider module
41 commits in 30d, 581 in 6mo, extremely high churn
22 commits in 14d above CI/CD review threshold (16+)
authProvider.ts has 14+ commits in 14d alone, auth flow under active development
authProvider.ts and authProvider.test.ts both have uncommitted working tree modifications
Contains authProvider.ts: authentication and RLS enforcement, mistakes lock out all users
Contains composedDataProvider.ts: god class routing all DB access, change affects all resources
Caution Zone per CLAUDE.md: composedDataProvider.ts and authProvider.ts
modules.notes: authProvider.ts is the single most active Caution Zone file this audit cycle: recovery link redirect, set-password flow, admin password reset, OTP invite fallback, PASSWORD_RECOVERY event handler all added in 14 days.

modules.name: opportunities
risk_factors: 26.7K LOC largest feature module

7-stage pipeline transitions, duplicate detection, auth warnings
Kanban and slideOverTabs subdirectories add structural complexity
6 DB tables including junction and audit tables
Business-critical: directly drives MFB revenue pipeline KPIs
modules.notes: Circular reference with providers resolved in prior cycle. Stage enum imports sourced from constants.

risk_factors: 41.9K LOC: largest module by line count in entire codebase

ListToolbar.tsx and AdaptiveFilterContainer.tsx remain active hotspots

phase_1.rationale: Low LOC low churn isolated blast radius. settings notifications login all gained partial test coverage in prior cycle. New small modules (admin config shared root tests) are stable and low-complexity.
entry_criteria: Local build verified: npm install and npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm run lint passes with zero errors
Developer has read CLAUDE.md and CORE_CONSTRAINTS.md
exit_criteria: All unit tests pass (npm run test)
No new console statements in production code (CMD-001)

phase_2.rationale: Moderate LOC partial test coverage or notable coupling. validation (91 fan-in) utils (73 fan-in) and constants (72 fan-in) changes must be verified broadly. productDistributors now has partial test coverage but RLS exposure remains. sales exceeds CI/CD churn threshold 16+ commits in 14d for third consecutive audit.
entry_criteria: Phase 1 complete and exit criteria verified
Developer has reviewed dependency-map.json for fan-in counts
Validation schema changes reviewed by tech lead
RLS policies reviewed for junction-table changes per DB-008
constants/stage-enums changes require review of all pipeline stage consumers
exit_criteria: SQL dry-run passes: npx supabase db push --dry-run
Code review by two developers for validation utils or constants changes

phase_3.rationale: Large LOC 13K-42K very high churn business-critical logic auth/security or production schema. supabase is the highest-churn module this cycle 57 commits in 30d two uncommitted items in working tree. providers/authProvider.ts had 14+ commits in 14 days on auth flow rework co-active with supabase/functions/users/index.ts. opportunities has highest historical coupling. src/components above CI/CD review threshold three consecutive audits.
entry_criteria: Phase 2 complete and exit criteria verified
Playwright E2E smoke tests pass on staging
Tech lead review for changes to composedDataProvider.ts or authProvider.ts
Staging database snapshot taken before migration work
Supabase dry-run verified: npx supabase db push --dry-run
exit_criteria: Playwright E2E full suite passes on staging
Manual QA sign-off from product owner
RLS policy review completed if auth or access-control changes
Zero TypeScript errors and zero lint errors
Performance baseline verified: under 2s for principal dashboard queries
pgTAP security tests pass if RLS policies changed
authProvider.ts and users/index.ts uncommitted changes committed and reviewed together

regression_priorities.reason: 14+ commits in 14 days covering recovery link redirect set-password page admin password reset OTP invite fallback PASSWORD_RECOVERY event handler and idempotent invite flow. Uncommitted working tree modifications. Mistakes lock out all users. Caution Zone per CLAUDE.md.

8 commits in 14d co-active with authProvider.ts on the same auth/invite rework. Uncommitted modification in working tree. Runs with service_role privileges. Invite orphan recovery and admin password reset flows all changed simultaneously.

57 commits in 30d 644 in 6mo: highest-churn module in the codebase. New uncommitted migration 20260303110000_fix_admin_restore_sale_race.sql in working tree. RLS governs all data access and tenant isolation. No rollback path.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: pgTAP RLS tests + supabase db push --dry-run before every push

regression_priorities.reason: God class: all DB access routes through this file. 41 commits in 30d. Any change affects all resources simultaneously.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests per handler + integration smoke test

regression_priorities.reason: Jumped from 0 to 16 commits in 30d with active list architecture refactoring. Zero test coverage. New surfaces: Excel-style header filters preset filters adaptive filter sidebar. Used across all list views.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for filter state + Playwright E2E for list views

regression_priorities.reason: 41.9K LOC 19 commits in 14d CI/CD threshold exceeded for third consecutive audit. Broadly consumed by all feature modules.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for ra-wrappers visual regression for layout components

regression_priorities.reason: Highest coupling in codebase 19 fan-in 10 fan-out. 773 commits in 6 months. Business-critical revenue pipeline.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit + Playwright E2E for stage transitions and kanban board

regression_priorities.reason: 91 fan-in dependents. Schema shape changes cascade to every resource. Create schema strictness per CORE-005 must be maintained.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for all schema boundaries

regression_priorities.reason: 73 fan-in dependents. Partial test coverage. Regressions in staleness calculation or formatting utilities propagate broadly.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for all utility functions

regression_priorities.reason: 17 commits in 14d exceeds CI/CD threshold 16+ for third consecutive audit. RBAC inputs and disable/reassign dialog are high-consequence operations.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit for permission rules + Playwright E2E for disable/reassign flow

regression_priorities.reason: Self-referential hierarchy principal authorization management and distributor_principal_authorizations table. RLS must enforce both FK sides per DB-008. 594 commits in 6mo.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest + pgTAP for RLS on authorization tables

regression_priorities.reason: Multi-step CSV import wizard. Data integrity risk on bulk operations. 32 commits in 30d 561 in 6mo.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit for import steps + Playwright E2E for wizard flow

regression_priorities.reason: 72 fan-in dependents. stage-enums.ts is canonical home for pipeline stage constants. Any enum rename breaks all consumers.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests validating enum values are stable

regression_priorities.reason: 8 fan-in dependents partial test coverage. Business workflow logic per PRV-006.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for StorageService and ValidationService

regression_priorities.reason: Junction table with 11 fan-in dependents. Now has partial test coverage but RLS must still validate both FK sides per DB-008 and DB-009.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: pgTAP RLS tests for product_distributors policies

regression_priorities.reason: dompurify used for HTML sanitization. Misconfigured sanitization allows XSS. 7 fan-in consumers.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for sanitization boundary

regression_priorities.reason: Dual versions V3/V4 create ambiguity. 6 DB tables aggregated. DnD-kit state complexity.
